features.name: Teacher View
features.description: Interactive presentation mode for teachers with slide navigation, real-time AI assistant (Gemini), and advanced annotation tools (SmartBoard).

features.name: Student View
features.description: Student interface for practicing questions with immediate feedback and read-only annotations.

features.name: Creator Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard for creating and managing question sets, including bulk upload and PDF generation.

features.name: SmartBoard
features.description: Professional whiteboard engine with high-performance ink, shapes, and history management.

features.name: Services
features.description: Core services for storage, AI, and PDF generation.
